LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE RESPONDENT AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO JULY 11, 2013 TO GIVE NOTICE TO THE DEFENDANT REGARDING THE NEW COMPUTATION OF THE AWARD. THE TENTATIVE RULING STATED $17,069.42 AS THE TOTAL AWARD WHICH SHOULD HAVE BEEN $19,637.56. MR. BROME TO GIVE NOTICE TO THE RESPONDENT. NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
